props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The initial value of the slider. It can be less than startingValue or greater than maxValue.

props.name: startingValue
props.description: The starting point for the slider's range, e.g., startingValue=100 allows the slider to start at 100.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum value the slider can reach.

props.name: className
props.description: Allows passing custom class names to style the component.

props.name: isStepped
props.description: Enables or disables stepped increments on the slider.

props.name: stepSize
props.description: The size of the increments for the slider when isStepped is enabled.

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Custom JSX or HTML code to display on the left side of the slider.

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Custom JSX or HTML code to display on the right side of the slider.
